source_url: How to stay focused working from home
english_script:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 11 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about staying focused while working from home. The speaker shared some simple tips. First, have a special place just for work. Don't work from your bed. Second, make a clear plan for your day. Know what you need to do first. Third, take short breaks often. Stand up and move around. This helps your body and mind. Fourth, turn off your phone or put it away. Stop checking social media. Last, tell your family or friends your work hours. Ask them not to bother you. From this I learned that small changes can make a big difference. Working from home is not easy, but these tips can help.

Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation:
大家好，我是Lulu。每天英语练习的第11天。我坚持说话来提高英语口语。

今天我看了一个关于在家工作如何保持专注的视频。分享者给出了一些简单的建议。第一，有一个专门的工作空间。不要在床上工作。第二，制定一个清晰的每日计划。知道首先需要做什么。第三，经常短暂休息。站起来走走。这有助于你的身体和大脑。第四，关掉手机或放远一点。停止查看社交媒体。最后，告诉家人或朋友你的工作时间。请他们不要打扰你。从中学到，小的改变能带来大的不同。在家工作不容易，但这些建议会有帮助。

谢谢收听，明天见。
